<!--
Use this template when the issue should be the normal execution-unit source of
truth for one implementation phase. See docs/ISSUE_CENTRIC_FLOW.md and
docs/GITHUB_ISSUE_PROJECTS_OPERATIONS.md.
-->

This template assumes the issue is already in `ready` state and should represent
`1 issue = 1 phase = one coherent value bundle`.

If the work still needs major decomposition, keep it in `planned` first instead
of using this template as a catch-all execution bucket.

If you are promoting from the seed backlog, use
`docs/ISSUE_CENTRIC_SEED_ISSUES.md` and
`docs/templates/PLANNED_ISSUE_SEED_TEMPLATE.md` before switching to this
template.

If this issue was promoted from a `planned` parent, keep the parent planned
issue linked and explain why this slice is the direct Codex target now.

## Background

Describe the upstream context that matters here.
Reference ChatGPT Projects context or repo docs when relevant.

## Goal

Describe the intended outcome in one short paragraph.
